sourceDiff:
- ctx=>{const stems=[ctx.sixLines.year.gan,ctx.sixLines.month.gan,ctx.sixLines.day.gan,ctx.sixLines.hour.gan];const hasJia=stems.some(g=>g==="\u7532");const hasJi=stems.some(g=>g==="\u5DF1");return hasJia&&hasJi&&ctx.dayGan==="\u7532"}
+ ctx=>{const stems=[ctx.sixLines.year.gan,ctx.sixLines.month.gan,ctx.sixLines.day.gan,ctx.sixLines.hour.gan];const hasYi=stems.some(g=>g==="\u4E59");const hasGeng=stems.some(g=>g==="\u5E9A");return hasYi&&hasGeng&&ctx.dayGan==="\u4E59"}
